_comment: River Bankers structure-deck card data. 48 main-deck cards (excludes species starter cards). Source: sim.js STRUCT_CARDS table. Effect prose uses standardized prefixes: 'End of game:', 'When built:', 'When you build:', 'Once per game (flip card):', 'At 0 on 🐟 track:', 'As an action:'. Cards without a matching prefix (continuous passives, reactive triggers) state the rule plainly. The 🐟 glyph is rendered inline by generate.py.

cards.name: Spillway
cards.effect: When built: wash one card from River 1 to the shoreline (workers carry along).

cards.name: Hollowed-out Log
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): recall one worker from a river card (no blank).

cards.name: Snag Pile
cards.effect: When built: pull a Headwaters card to River 1; run an auction on it at 1🐟/item.

cards.name: Heron Watch
cards.effect: End of game: +1 VP per shoreline card on the table (max +6).

cards.name: Reed Bed
cards.effect: Reed icons cost you 1 less 🐟 per item (min 1).

cards.name: Mud Levee
cards.effect: When built: drop 2 blanks on uncovered icons in the river.

cards.name: Log Flume
cards.effect: When you build: advance 3 fewer 🐟 (min 1).

cards.name: Cache Burrow
cards.effect: +1 to your hand size. When built, draw a structure card.

cards.name: Vine Lattice
cards.effect: When built: draw 3 structure cards, keep 1, discard 2.

cards.name: Charcoal Pit
cards.effect: When you build: 1 of your Clay workers may substitute for any other material.

cards.name: Lookout Tree
cards.effect: Peek at the top of the material deck at any time.

cards.name: Pier
cards.effect: End of game: +2 VP per shoreline card with at least one of your workers (max +6).

cards.name: Cattail Marsh
cards.effect: When you build: each Reed worker counts as 2 reeds.

cards.name: Wood Pile
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): claim 1 uncovered Log icon from any river card for 1🐟.

cards.name: Heron Roost
cards.effect: As an action: pay 1🐟 to replace a Headwaters card with the top of the material deck; shuffle the replaced card back into the deck.

cards.name: Pontoon
cards.effect: When a jammed auction makes you place fewer workers than your bid, pay 🐟 for one fewer worker.

cards.name: Mill Wheel
cards.effect:
When built: activate one "when built" effect of a built structure controlled by the player to your left or right.

As an action: activate the "as an action" ability of a built structure controlled by the player to your left or right.

cards.name: Stone Pool
cards.effect: When built: look at the top 5 material cards and rearrange them in any order.

cards.name: Flush Channel
cards.effect: When built: discard 1 Headwaters card (out of game) and refill that slot from the material deck. No auction.

cards.name: Granary
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): your build costs 1 fewer of one listed material.

cards.name: Royal Lodge
cards.effect: When built: take an immediate extra turn.

cards.name: Streambank Hollow
cards.effect: When you recall workers before an auction, slide back 1🐟 per worker recalled.

cards.name: Floodgate
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): before an auction resolves, slide the auctioned card 1 space toward the Headwaters.

cards.name: Burrow Run
cards.effect: When built: slide your pawn back 5 on 🐟 track.

cards.name: Sap Drip
cards.effect: When built: place 2 free workers from your supply onto uncovered icons of one river card.

cards.name: Spy Mound
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): decide your auction bid after the other players reveal theirs.

cards.name: Vine Ladder
cards.effect: End of game: +4 VP per built structure of yours that uses Vines (max +12).

cards.name: Vine Trellis
cards.effect:
When you build a structure that uses Vines: slide back 1🐟.

End of game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Vines.

cards.name: Stone Causeway
cards.effect:
When you build a structure that uses Stones: draw 1 structure card and discard 1.

End of game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Stones (max +8).

cards.name: Reed Walkway
cards.effect:
When you build a structure that uses Reeds: place 1 free worker on a River 1 card.

End of game: +2 VP per built structure of yours that uses Reeds.

cards.name: Clay Vault
cards.effect:
When you build a structure that uses Clay: peek at the top of the structure deck; you may swap it with 1 card from your hand.

End of game: +3 VP per built structure of yours that uses Clay (max +12).

cards.name: Burrow Network
cards.effect:
When you build a structure that uses Mud: move one of your workers to another river card with at least one of your workers (may replace a blank).

End of game: +3 VP per built structure of yours that uses Mud (max +9).

cards.name: Driftwood Snag
cards.effect: As an action: pay 1🐟 to add a blank to any uncovered icon.

cards.name: Salt Lick
cards.effect: When built: look at every opponent's hand of structure cards.

cards.name: Hidden Cache
cards.effect: End of game: +3 VP per 2 distinct materials in your built structures (max +9).

cards.name: Treaty Stone
cards.effect: When you build: you may spend 2 of any one material as 1 of any other. Once per build.

cards.name: Cattail Patch
cards.effect: End of game: VP equal to 1/1/2/3/5/8 for 1/2/3/4/5/6 distinct materials across your built structures.

cards.name: Pack Rat Burrow
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): discard 1 structure from your hand and take one of your choice from the discard pile.

cards.name: Tribute Stone
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): force an opponent to recall one of their workers from a river card (drops a blank). They slide back 3🐟 in compensation.

cards.name: Tow Line
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): move any river card to River 1, then run an auction on it (no flat 🐟).

cards.name: Portage
cards.effect: As an action: swap one of your workers on a river card with another worker on a different river card. Pay the source card's per-item cost in 🐟.

cards.name: Salmon Run
cards.effect: As an action: place 1-5 workers from your supply onto uncovered icons of one river card. 🐟 cost escalates 1/2/3/5/8 per successive worker.

cards.name: Slipstream
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): take a turn immediately after another player, even if you are not next on 🐟 track.

cards.name: Trophy Lodge
cards.effect: End of game: +3 VP per ?-VP structure you control, including this one (max +12).

cards.name: Springwater Pool
cards.effect: When built: ready all of your spent once-per-game cards.

cards.name: Spring Cascade
cards.effect: Once per game (flip card): ready one of your other spent once-per-game cards.

cards.name: Trading Post
cards.effect: As an action: pay 1🐟 to recall 1 worker each from 3 different-material cards (drops 3 blanks), then place 2 free workers from supply onto uncovered icons of one card.

cards.name: Confluence
cards.effect: As an action: pool two cards that share a material symbol into one combined auction, merging their uncovered icons. You pay the lower of the two trigger 🐟 costs to start it, and everyone bids at the lower of the two 🐟/item rates. Both cards then float downriver.
